summary: Completed comprehensive mobile testing for EU Digital Banking Platform - Mobile Experience Improvements. Verified all three requested improvements: (1) Restricted users can copy IBAN number with larger touch-friendly button on mobile, (2) Logo is bigger on mobile (text-xl/20px with font-bold), (3) Everything works correctly on mobile for restricted users including proper restriction alerts and accessible support page.
passed_tests: Mobile viewport set correctly (390x844 - iPhone size)
Logo is bigger on mobile - verified text-xl (20px) with font-weight: 700
Account Restricted banner clearly visible with €2,500 tax hold amount
IBAN visible and formatted correctly: DE99 8109 2527 3416 0060 53
Copy IBAN button larger on mobile - verified w-5 h-5 (20px x 20px)
Copy IBAN functionality works with multiple fallback methods (clipboard API, execCommand, prompt)
Copy feedback shows 'Copied!' message to user
Restricted user sees appropriate alerts when trying to access restricted features (View transactions, transaction items, stat tiles)
Mobile bottom navigation visible with 4 tabs (Home, Accounts, Activity, Profile)
Support page accessible for restricted user
Smooth scrolling works correctly on mobile
Touch-manipulation class applied for better touch targets
All mobile-specific CSS improvements applied correctly
